title: MiddleClickExtra
description: Does Various jobs when Middle click is Pressed!
body:
# MIDDLE CLICK EXTRA
mod that lets you perform multiple actions with just a simple middle click! Whether it’s pearling or using a firework rocket you can do it instantly without switching to the hotbar slot! Might be considered as an **Unfair Advantage** in some servers so ask before using it
## **This mod has 3 modes:-**
1. Firework
2. Pearl
3. XP

Middle clicking will use **1** of these items
